summary: Iteration 28: Tested Standards Library dynamic categories + Edit/Delete from popup. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All endpoints working correctly. Frontend: All features verified - 31 dynamic categories in dropdowns, '+ Custom category' option with text input, Edit button populates form, Delete requires two-click confirmation.
test_credentials: Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Management: hjohnny.super@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Edit_Delete_Iter28 standard during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified Standards Library dynamic categories and edit/delete from popup: (1) GET /api/standard-categories returns 27+ default categories merged with any custom categories from DB, sorted alphabetically. (2) DELETE /api/standards/{id} returns {deleted: true, id: ...}. (3) PATCH /api/standards/{id} updates and returns full standard. (4) Frontend category filter dropdown shows 31 options (30 defaults + 'All categories'). (5) Authoring form category dropdown shows 31 options including '+ Custom category'. (6) Selecting '+ Custom category' shows text input (data-testid='standards-custom-category-input'). (7) StandardDetailPopup has Edit and Delete buttons in sticky footer. (8) Edit button (data-testid='standard-detail-edit-btn') populates authoring form and closes popup. (9) Delete button (data-testid='standard-detail-delete-btn') shows 'Confirm delete' on first click (data-testid='standard-detail-confirm-delete-btn'), then deletes on second click.

frontend_category_dropdown.custom_category_input: PASS - Text input appears when selected (data-testid='standards-custom-category-input')

frontend_detail_popup.edit_populates_form: PASS - Form title populated with standard data
frontend_detail_popup.delete_removes_standard: PASS - Standard removed after confirm click
